name: Wild Duck and Andouille Sauce Piquant
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the duck breasts in some olive oil.
2. Make a roux using the olive oil and flour (see Justin's recipe for details).
3. Add onions, bell pepper, green onions, and parsley to the roux. Stir and cook.
4. Add one cup water and garlic. Cook until absorbed.
5. Add wine and more water. Season with tomato sauce, Lea & Perrins, salt, and cayenne. Mix well.
6. Add Andouille (or smoked sausage) and duck breasts. Stir to combine.
7. Simmer on low heat for 3 to 4 hours, stirring occasionally until the duck is tender.
8. Adjust seasoning with additional salt and cayenne as desired.
9. Serve over spaghetti or rice.
